calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jason Louie for (petitioner) Cindy Huey.

The Court asked if counsel had additional arguments. Mr. Louie stated that if the property does not get passed on to the spouse there will be tax issues. The Court took the petition for spousal property under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
